article_meta.title: The headquarters of the Euroclear financial institute in Brussels Photograph: Nicolas Maeterlinck/Belga Mag/AFP/Getty Im

reasoning: One clear attribution violation (flagging a quoted source line) and multiple questionable flags/labels. Some plausible bias in author prose was missed.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Flagged a direct quote as author bias, though other items were from author prose.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Several flagged items are weak or incorrect: the opening line is attributed and not clearly slanted; the ‘Omission of Source Attribution’ claim misreads an already-attributed statement.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed defensible author-prose issues like vague sourcing (‘it is understood...’) and the unqualified ‘critical to maintain Kyiv’s war effort’ in the author’s voice.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Misapplied ‘Omission of Source Attribution’ where attribution existed; ‘Word Choice’ for ‘deliberate targeting’ is reasonable, but other labels were debatable.
